name: building
checklist: doc 06 — equip the hammer (slot 1): the build panel appears with [Q] piece / [T] tier hints and a ghost snaps to the 3m grid ahead of you.
Aim at open ground: the foundation ghost is GREEN; click to place — 8 wood is deducted and the slab appears (walk onto it: you step up).
Cycle to wall with Q: edges of the foundation cell highlight; place walls on three sides, a doorway on the fourth, then cycle to door and place it in the doorway.
Walk into a wall: you are blocked (no rubber-banding — prediction matches the server). Walk under the doorway header: you pass.
Press E at the closed door: it opens (anyone can — locks are a later slice); walk through, E again to close. A trunk/crate shoved at an OPEN doorway rolls through.
Try to place inside a town or the military compound: the ghost turns RED with 'building is not allowed here'.
Ask a friend to stand in the target cell: the ghost/server rejects with 'someone is in the way'.
Aim at your own wall and HOLD X ~0.6s: it demolishes (no refund). A foundation with walls attached refuses until they're removed.
Toggle tier with T: scrap pieces cost scrap (8 in the kit — enough for one door); place one and note the grey tint.
Rejoin (or restart the preview after ~20s): every piece is still there with the same collision — structures persist with the world snapshot.
Without the hammer equipped, clicking swings/attacks as before — build mode only captures the click while the hammer is held.
